title: Schema
purpose: `json/schema.vitl` is a public stdlib surface inside the `json` family. It should be read as one focused slice of the broader family responsibility: Structured JSON surfaces including parse, parser, types, builder, schema, stringify, and serialize.
use_cases: A build plan can be validated as domain data first and then exported to JSON in a separate step.
A parser page should say how syntax becomes JSON values before serialization details appear.
